children.heading: Victim screening tools
children.label: a Victim screening tools
children.text: Not later than , the Attorney General shall compile and disseminate, to all grantees who are awarded grants to provide victims’ services under subsection (b) or (f) of , information about reliable and effective tools for the identification of victims of human trafficking.October 1, 2018section 7105 of this title

children.heading: Use of screening procedures
children.label: b Use of screening procedures
children.text: Beginning not later than , the Attorney General, in consultation with the Secretary of Health and Human Services, shall identify recommended practices for the screening of human trafficking victims and shall encourage the use of such practices by grantees receiving a grant to provide victim services to youth under subsection (b) or (f) of .October 1, 2018section 7105 of this title
